Hastings.intel: Hastings is 1-3 overall, on a 3-game losing streak. Beat Blind Brook 6-2 in league opener (Coach Stampfl's 100th career win) but lost to Pelham 0-2, Westlake 2-11, and Eastchester 0-1. Offense struggling with three shutout or near-shutout losses. Up next: vs Putnam Valley Apr 10 5:00 PM, vs Scarsdale Apr 11 3:00 PM.

Drew — pitched in 2026 opener vs Blind Brook

Pearl River.intel: Pearl River is 0-1, losing their opener 7-8 to Nyack on Mar 23. Up next: vs Dobbs Ferry Apr 11 (Sat) 3:00 PM.

Rye Neck.intel: Rye Neck is 3-1 overall, strong early season. Demolished Haldane 13-1 and beat Sleepy Hollow 15-5. Lost to Pawling 0-6 on Apr 8, ending a 3-game win streak. Up next: vs Bronxville Apr 10 4:30 PM.
stars: Colin Kelley (Sr) — Captain, P/CF, Section 1 All-Section selection

Saunders.intel: Saunders has not posted 2026 varsity results or schedule on DigitalSports. Lost to Dobbs Ferry 3-7 on Mar 27. Up next: schedule TBD.

Sleepy Hollow.intel: Sleepy Hollow is 3-3 overall, on a 2-game win streak. Beat Haldane 12-10 and crushed Dobbs Ferry 18-1. Lost to Irvington 8-9, Briarcliff 0-14, and Rye Neck 5-15. High-variance team with blowout wins and losses. Up next: at Yonkers Montessori Apr 10 4:30 PM.
stars: Charlie Farbman — 2026 roster, part of 18-1 W vs DF

Tuckahoe.intel: Tuckahoe is 1-0, winning their opener 6-5 over Somers on Apr 8. Playing at Mount Vernon today Apr 9 4:30 PM. Up next: at New Rochelle Apr 10 4:30 PM, vs Pawling Apr 13 4:45 PM.

Valhalla.intel: Valhalla has not posted 2026 varsity results or schedule on DigitalSports. No events added for their varsity team. Up next: vs Blind Brook Apr 8 4:30 PM (per Blind Brook schedule).

Westlake.intel: Westlake is 3-0 with a 3-game win streak. Beat Bronxville 4-3, Hastings 11-2, and John Jay CR 14-12 in a wild comeback. Potent offense averaging 9.7 runs/game. Playing at Tappan Zee today Apr 9 4:30 PM. Up next: vs Pleasantville Apr 10 4:30 PM.
